summary: Iteration 91 testing complete. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Attendance Settings page loads with 4 tabs (Holidays, Special Periods, Shifts, General Rules), Holidays tab shows 2 Eid Al Fitr holidays (Mar 20-21 2026), Special Periods tab shows Ramadan 2026 with 6h full day and shift 09:00-15:00, Shifts tab shows 3 shifts (Morning, Afternoon, India) with edit/delete buttons, General Rules tab shows grace period, full day hours, half day hours settings. Attendance Settings link visible in HR sidebar. API correctly returns holiday status and special_period field for monthly attendance.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (Eid holidays Mar 20-21, Ramadan special period Mar 1-20)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91 features fully tested. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/hr/holidays?year=2026 returns 2 Eid Al Fitr holidays on Mar 20-21. 2) POST /api/hr/holidays creates holidays for date range. 3) DELETE /api/hr/holidays/{id} deletes holiday. 4) GET /api/hr/settings/attendance-rules returns rules with special_periods array containing Ramadan 2026 (Mar 1-20, 6h full day, shift 09:00-15:00). 5) PUT /api/hr/settings/attendance-rules saves special periods and rules. 6) GET /api/hr/shifts returns 3 shifts: Morning (10:00-19:00), Afternoon (13:00-22:00), India (11:00-20:00). 7) PUT /api/hr/shifts/{id} updates shift. 8) DELETE /api/hr/shifts/{id} deletes shift. 9) GET /api/hr/my-monthly-attendance?year=2026&month=3 returns days with status='holiday' and holiday_name='Eid Al Fitr' for Mar 20-21, and special_period='Ramadan 2026' for Mar 1-20. 10) Summary includes holiday count (2). 11) Frontend: Attendance Settings page at /hr/attendance-settings with 4 tabs, Add Holiday/Period/Shift buttons, Edit/Delete buttons on items, Save Rules button on General Rules tab. 12) Attendance Settings link in HR sidebar.

holidays_api.details: GET /api/hr/holidays?year=2026 returns 2 Eid Al Fitr holidays (Mar 20, Mar 21). POST creates holidays for date range. DELETE removes holiday.

attendance_rules_api.details: GET /api/hr/settings/attendance-rules returns rules with special_periods array. PUT saves grace period, full day hours, special periods.

shifts_api.details: GET /api/hr/shifts returns 3 shifts (Morning, Afternoon, India). PUT updates shift. DELETE removes shift. POST creates new shift.

monthly_attendance_holiday_status.details: GET /api/hr/my-monthly-attendance shows Mar 20-21 as status='holiday' with holiday_name='Eid Al Fitr'. Summary includes holiday count.

monthly_attendance_special_period.details: GET /api/hr/my-monthly-attendance includes special_period='Ramadan 2026' for days Mar 1-20.

attendance_settings_page.details: Page at /hr/attendance-settings loads with 4 tabs: Holidays, Special Periods, Shifts, General Rules.

holidays_tab.details: Shows 2 Eid holidays with date, type badge, delete button. Add Holiday button present. Year selector works.

special_periods_tab.details: Shows Ramadan 2026 with dates (Mar 1-20), 6h full day, shift 09:00-15:00. Edit/Delete buttons. Add Special Period button.

shifts_tab.details: Shows 3 shifts (Morning, Afternoon, India) with start/end times, grace period, location. Edit/Delete buttons. Add Shift button.

general_rules_tab.details: Shows Grace Period (30 mins), Full Day (6h), Half Day (3h), Friday/Saturday off checkboxes. Save Rules button.

sidebar_link.details: Attendance Settings link visible in HR sidebar under Human Resources section.
